testcase.name: test_login_with_username_string
testcase.failure: tests/test_iter68_extra.py:99: in test_login_with_username_string assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":[{"type":"string_too_long","loc":["body","username"],"msg":"String should have at most 20 characters","input":"qa_login_test_d304d518","ctx":{"max_length":20},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/string_too_long"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422 Unprocessable Entity]>.status_code
